name: Ansible
description: Ansible is an agentless IT automation tool for configuration management, application deployment, and infrastructure orchestration. This LXC provides a dedicated controller node that connects to Proxmox hosts via SSH and manages LXC containers using the community.general proxmox_pct_remote connection plugin.

notes.text: The generated SSH public key is displayed at the end of installation. Add it to /home/ansible/.ssh/authorized_keys on each Proxmox host.
Retrieve the public key at any time with: cat /root/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub
